# Verify Press Logo / Award Badge Laundering

## Claim being tested

Logos and badges imply real endorsement or validation.

## Alternative hypothesis

The logo/badge is used out of context, based on minor mention, paid placement, outdated award, or unaudited credential.

## Data fields

- logo/badge text
- original source URL
- date
- quote context
- award criteria
- payment/incentive
- permission
- current relevance
- claim placement on page

## Metrics

- source-quality score
- context-stripping score
- age of credential
- award independence
- quote-to-claim mismatch

## Safe conclusion

"The legitimacy signal is weak if the badge or logo is materially stronger than the underlying source event."
